tasks.title: Playtest session: core loop flow analysis
tasks.description: Simuler 10 sessions de jeu complètes. Tracer le core loop Hub→Biome→Ogham→Carte→Minigame→Effets. Vérifier les invariants: vie 0-100, rep caps ±20/carte, MOS soft min 8 / hard max 50, drain -1/carte au début. Tester les edge cases: vie=1+drain, faction=100+bonus, MOS=50. Écrire le rapport dans tools/autodev/status/test_reports/playtest_core_loop.json

tasks.title: Game Design Bible audit: code vs spec compliance
tasks.description: Audit complet code vs GAME_DESIGN_BIBLE.md v2.4. Vérifier les 12 systèmes (vie, factions, oghams, options, champs lexicaux, minigames, MOS, Anam, confiance, multiplicateur, FastRoute, save). Détecter le dead code des systèmes supprimés (Triade, Souffle, Bestiole, Awen, D20, Flux). Écrire le rapport dans tools/autodev/status/test_reports/bible_audit.json

tasks.title: Bug hunt: static analysis of 8 core files
tasks.description: Analyse statique des 8 fichiers core. Chercher: null/invalid access, signal disconnections, type mismatches (:= avec CONST), state machine bugs, resource leaks, game logic bugs (division par 0, overflow). Classer par sévérité CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW. Écrire le rapport dans tools/autodev/status/test_reports/bug_hunt_core.json
tasks.notes: Completed by cloud cycle.

tasks.title: Playtest session: death & edge case scenarios
tasks.description: Simuler 10 scénarios de mort et edge cases: vie=0 pendant effet, toutes factions à 0, toutes factions à 100, Ogham sans ressources, MOS hard max atteint, Anam cross-run calcul, save mid-run + restore, Confiance Merlin T0→T3 mid-run, FastRoute carte avec champs manquants, multiplicateur overflow x2.0 cap. Rapport dans tools/autodev/status/test_reports/playtest_edge_cases.json

tasks.title: Bug hunt: LLM integration & AI layer
tasks.description: Analyse statique du layer IA. Chercher: timeout LLM non géré (softlock), JSON malformé du LLM non parsé, fallback manquant si Ollama down, race condition multi-brain, contexte RAG overflow, prompt injection dans les réponses LLM. Rapport dans tools/autodev/status/test_reports/bug_hunt_ai.json
tasks.notes: Completed by cloud cycle.

tasks.title: Fix missing await DAMAGE_LIFE drain (BUG-001)
tasks.description: Added await on store.dispatch DAMAGE_LIFE at L342. Player at 1HP now dies from drain.

tasks.title: Fix missing await _request_next_card (BUG-002)
tasks.description: Added await on _request_next_card at L704. Prevents double card display.

tasks.title: Fix _BIOME_DISPLAY_NAMES missing iles_mystiques (BUG-003)
tasks.description: Add iles_mystiques to _BIOME_DISPLAY_NAMES dict. 8th biome produces garbled text without it.
tasks.notes: Added iles_mystiques: les iles mystiques to _BIOME_DISPLAY_NAMES dict. Confirmed 8th biome key matches merlin_constants.gd BIOME_KEYS and Bible v2.4.

tasks.title: Fix effect format mismatch string vs dict (BUG-004)
tasks.description: process_card expects string effects but card_system sends dict. Silently rejects all dict effects.
tasks.notes: Added static _dict_to_effect_string() converter. apply_effects() now accepts both String and Dictionary effects. Dict effects are converted to colon-separated format before parsing. Covers all VALID_CODES including multi-arg effects (ADD_REPUTATION, SET_FLAG, CREATE_PROMISE, etc.).

tasks.title: Fix _randi_range modulo bias (BUG-006)
tasks.description: Replace flawed randf()*N%N formula with randi_range() builtin.
tasks.notes: Replaced biased from + int(randf() * float(N)) % N with Godot built-in randi_range(from, to). The _rng path was already correct; only the fallback was flawed.

tasks.title: Fix transient MerlinGaugeSystem instance (BUG-005)
tasks.description: MerlinGaugeSystem.new().build_default_gauges() creates a throwaway RefCounted every call. Made build_default_gauges() static.
tasks.notes: Made build_default_gauges() static since it only reads const data. Caller in merlin_store.gd now calls MerlinGaugeSystem.build_default_gauges() without instantiation. All existing callers on instances remain compatible (GDScript allows calling static on instances).

tasks.title: Fix ADD_REPUTATION encapsulation violation (BUG-007)
tasks.description: ADD_REPUTATION in _apply_effect() was calling effects._apply_faction_reputation() directly, bypassing the dispatch/recording pipeline.
tasks.notes: Replaced direct private method call with effects.apply_effects([effect_str], 'RESOLVE_CHOICE'). Now goes through parsing, validation, recording, and the public API. Effect log now captures ADD_REPUTATION effects from card resolution.

tasks.title: Fix null reference in _reset_ai_for_new_run (BUG-008)
tasks.description: Accessed merlin_ai_node.session_contexts.clear() without checking if session_contexts property exists.
tasks.notes: Added guard: if merlin_ai_node.get('session_contexts') != null before .clear(). Prevents crash when MerlinAI node exists but doesn't have session_contexts property (e.g. during initialization or if property was removed).

tasks.title: Fix faction default 0 vs 20 mismatch (BUG-014/015)
tasks.description: build_default_factions initializes to 0 (Hostile) instead of 20 (Neutral). Same in save default.
tasks.notes: Changed initialization from 0.0 to float(FACTION_SCORE_START) in reputation_system + save_system + web-demo Constants.ts. All 18/18 bugs now resolved.

tasks.title: Fix deterministic minigame selection (BUG-011)
tasks.description: pick_minigame_for_field uses field.hash()%size always returning same minigame. Add randomization.
tasks.notes: Replaced field.hash() % size with randi() % size for true random selection.

tasks.title: MerlinResponsive autoload — mobile scaling, safe areas, touch gestures
tasks.description: Central responsive system: viewport scaling, device detection (mobile/tablet/desktop), safe area awareness (notch/cutout), swipe touch gestures, breakpoint signals, responsive font scaling.

tasks.title: Adapt 6 UI scenes for mobile — responsive layouts + touch targets
tasks.description: All scenes adapted with safe area margins, responsive content widths, touch-friendly button heights (48-56px), responsive font sizes via MerlinVisual.responsive_size().

tasks.title: Wire DayNightManager into 3 scenes (HubAntre, TransitionBiome, BroceliandeForest3D)
tasks.description: 2D scenes: subtle color tint blend (25-30%). 3D scene: sun/fill/ambient/fog blending (30-50%). Conservative ratios preserve biome identity.

tasks.title: Playtest session: core loop flow analysis
tasks.description: Simulate a full run: Hub -> Biome -> Cards -> Minigames -> End. Verify flow, timing, edge cases.

tasks.title: Game Design Bible audit: code vs spec compliance
tasks.description: Compare every system in code vs bible v2.4. Report compliance percentage per section.

tasks.title: Setup autonomous cloud pipeline (Routines + Director + hooks)
tasks.description: SessionStart hook, Director agent, setup script, routine prompt for /schedule hourly.

tasks.title: Fix Calendar season mapping inconsistency with MerlinVisual
tasks.description: Calendar._get_season_for_date() used wrong month ranges vs MerlinVisual standard. Feb showed as spring instead of winter, Aug as autumn instead of summer.

tasks.title: Fix Calendar dict dot notation (same as BUG-012)
tasks.description: Calendar._load_meta_stats() used state.meta dot notation on Dictionary. Changed to state.get('meta', {}) with type hint.

tasks.title: Fix HubAntre store variable shadowing in panel methods
tasks.description: HubAntre._show_memoires_panel() and _show_journal_panel() declared local var store shadowing class member. Removed redundant locals.

tasks.title: Merlin Whisper ambient system — contextual druide quips during forest walks
tasks.description: MerlinWhisper CanvasLayer: 40+ context-sensitive whispers in 7 pools (generic, low_health, high_health, night, dawn, dusk, broceliande, veteran). Timer-based (18-30s), phosphor-dim fade-in/out with mist_breath SFX. Pause during encounters, resume after. Wired into BroceliandeForest3D with live context updates (health, time, total_runs).

tasks.title: WalkHUD card counter + currency rename
tasks.description: Added card count display (Carte N/5 with amber color progression at 50%/80% thresholds). Renamed essences to biome currency with diamond glyph. Backward-compat update_essences() wrapper kept. Encounter count tracking in BroceliandeForest3D.

tasks.title: Faction boost_weight — cards matching high-rep factions weighted 3x
tasks.description: When faction rep >= 50 (FACTION_THRESHOLD_CONTENT), event and fastroute cards with ADD_REPUTATION effects for that faction are weighted 3x in selection pool. Static helpers _get_card_factions() and _get_faction_boost(). Creator chose boost_weight approach (q-20260415-010).

tasks.title: Run history population + echo_memory + minigame/ogham counters
tasks.description: Populate meta.run_history at run end with 9-field 'Complet' entries (biome, cards_played, victory, life_at_end, dominant_faction, minigames_won, oghams_used, anam_earned, timestamp). Cap at 50 runs (q-20260414-002). Populate echo_memory (deaths_by_biome, dominant_factions_seen, choices_log). Add minigames_won/oghams_used counters to run state. Wire record_minigame_win() into game controller. Increment oghams_used on ogham activation.

tasks.title: Fix double reward application (C16 BUGFIX-026 never pushed)
tasks.description: C16 status files claimed BUGFIX-026 was fixed but code was never pushed. Removed _effects.apply_run_rewards() from controller L666 — StoreRun.handle_run_end() is the single source of truth.

tasks.title: Wire echo_memory + tension_zone into LLM narrative context
tasks.description: C16 feature never pushed. Added tension_zone/convergence_zone/echo_memory/total_runs to build_narrative_context(). Enhanced build_context_enrichment() with MOS convergence hints, veteran detection (5+ runs), biome death memory, dominant faction tracking.

tasks.title: 3rd GM few-shot example (PROGRESS_MISSION + high rep swings) + parser fix
tasks.description: Added Ex3 to GM system prompt: end-game pattern with PROGRESS_MISSION + high rep swings (±15-20). Added PROGRESS_MISSION explicit parser in _try_parse_effects_dict() — was silently dropped because it uses 'step' not 'amount'. Creator chose B (q-20260415-005).

tasks.title: Wire GameFlowController as autoload orchestrator for Hub→Run→Hub flow
tasks.description: GFC registered as GameFlow autoload. Deferred MerlinStore discovery with retry. Public API: request_run(), complete_run(), enter_card_game(), return_to_hub(). HubAntre and BroceliandeForest3D route transitions through GFC. Phase tracking (MENU/HUB/RUN/END_SCREEN/TALENT_TREE). Creator chose A: wrap_broc (q-20260415-011).

tasks.title: Fix GFC _save_system not wired in autoload mode (BUG-030)
tasks.description: _auto_setup() found MerlinStore but never wired _save_system. All save operations through GFC silently did nothing. Fixed by reading _store.save_system after store discovery.

tasks.title: Wire EndRunScreen into GFC flow — complete_run() → END_SCREEN → EndRunScreen
tasks.description: complete_run() now transitions to END_SCREEN phase and EndRunScreen.tscn (was going directly to HubAntre). EndRunScreen._ready() auto-discovers GameFlow autoload, wires hub_requested/faction_ending_chosen signals, calls show_results() with CRT-styled UI (narrative, stats, journey map, anam, faction choice). EndRunScreen.tscn fixed: script path corrected to scripts/run/end_run_screen.gd, node type changed from Node to Control. BroceliandeForest3D._on_run_complete() simplified from 60-line inline overlay to 12-line GFC call. Signal-driven _on_run_ended() and _on_hub_requested() now also transition scenes.

tasks.title: Fix _build_run_summary() missing story_log + run stats (BUG-031)
tasks.description: _build_run_summary() only passed biome/card_index/life/currency/merlin_found — missing story_log, oghams_used, minigames_won, faction_rep_delta. EndRunScreen showed zeros and JourneyMapDisplay always empty. Fixed by reading from MerlinStore.state.run + WalkEventController getters. Added card_idx to story entries.

tasks.title: JourneyMapDisplay CRT visual polish — glow nodes, dashed lines, effect pips
tasks.description: Rewritten from basic circles to full CRT timeline: glow-ring nodes colored by effect type, dashed phosphor connecting lines, effect pips (heal/damage/reputation/ogham/mission), final node with arc glow + V/X glyph, scroll indicators, cached terminal font, atmospheric empty state.
